{{Quote|Same maxer for me, but make my drink a Corellian noale,|Obi-Wan Kenobi|<ref name="Outbound Flight" />}}
'''Corellian noale''' was a drink served at [[Panky's]] and enjoyed by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]. In [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]], Kenobi, and [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] [[Lorana Jinzler]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], Kenobi's Padawan, entered Panky's, there, Kenobi ordered and drank a Corellian noale, which [[Gender/Legends|he]] enjoyed.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

==Appearances==
